title: Make 20 Year Anniversary image the full background

requirements.text: In the homepage hero section (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), apply the uploaded Bodyshape Fitness 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) as the full background covering the entire hero section, modifying CSS to ensure the image fills the background area completely with appropriate sizing (cover/contain) and positioning (center)

quotes: looks good now we just need to make this picture the background, whatever you need to do to the picture to make this happen

acceptanceCriteria: The 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png) displays as the full background of the hero section
The background image covers the entire hero section area
Foreground text and content remain readable over the background image
Background image is properly sized and positioned using CSS background properties

nonGoals: Modifying other sections of the homepage
